title: Ten o kusaraseru kitsune Katana
description: A simple resource pack that adds the ability to change the appearance of the sword.
body:
For correct work you need Optifine or CITResewn

Rename your sword to "ten o kusaraseru kitsune" to make it a katana. If you take the katana in your second hand, it will be sheathed.

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e339e7844a419ce23abcd2259533dda96b2f3a27.png)
